entries.source: Live modes, guides, and workflows related to this comparison.
entries.value: Live modusse, gidse en werkvloeie wat by hierdie vergelyking horen.

entries.source: LLMs, crawlers, and learners can follow the sitemap, RSS feed, llms.txt, and JSON content index.
entries.value: LLM's, crawlers en leerders kan die sitemap, RSS-feed, llms.txt en JSON-inhoudsindeks volg.

entries.source: llms.txt, llms-full.txt, and ai-content-index.json summarize public pages, routes, modes, guides, and citation boundaries for assistants.

entries.source: Machine-readable catalog of public pages, modes, learning paths, blog clusters, and indexing boundaries.

entries.source: Maintain simulation state across turns: location, time, identity, money, inventory, relationships, reputation, risk, event clock, field notes, and evidence confidence. Apply realistic consequences in strict mode.
entries.value: Hou die simulatiestatus by oor beurten heen: locatie, tijd, identiteit, geld, inventaris, verhoudings, reputatie, risico, gebeurtenisklok, veldnotas en vertroue in bewyse. Pas realistiese gevolg by in strikte modus.

entries.source: Maintain two layers: an in-character voice bounded by the selected time and worldview, and a historian sidecar that flags documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, anachronism, and uncertainty. Let the person resist, challenge, evade, ask questions back, or reject false premises when historically fitting.
entries.value: Hou twee lagen aan: 'n stem in karakter wat word begrensd deur die gekies tijd en wat gekies wereldbeeld, en 'n historiese sidecar wat gedocumenteerde feiten, plausibele reconstructie, betwiste interpretatie, moderne parafrase, anachronisme en onzekerheid markeert. Laat die persoon homself verstapten, uitdagen, ontwijken, vrae terugvra of onregte aannames afwysen wanneer dat histories past.

entries.source: Make a mixed math practice test
Make civics practical, nonpartisan, and understandable.
entries.value: Maak burgerschap prakties, onpartijdig en begrijpelijk.

entries.source: Make confusion easier to talk about
Make every learning session end with a test, artifact, or review step.
entries.value: Laat elke leersessie eindigen met 'n toets, artefact of herhalingsstap.

entries.source: Make flashcards from errors and revisit them after a delay.
entries.value: Maak flitskaarte uit foute en besoek hulle weer ná 'n vertraging.

entries.source: Make flashcards from errors, hesitation, formulas, definitions, and concepts you could not explain clearly.
entries.value: Maak flitskaarte uit foute, huiwering, formules, definisies en konsepte wat jy nie duidelik kon verduidelik nie.

entries.source: Make learning feel like a game with quests, levels, points, challenges, and boss rounds.
entries.value: Maak leer soos 'n speletjie met soeke, vlakke, punte, uitdagings en baas-rondes.

entries.source: Make mistakes come back at the right time
entries.value: Laat foute op die regte moment terugkomen

entries.source: Make music theory practical and audible in the learner's imagination.
entries.value: Maak musiektheorie prakties en hoorbaar in die verbeelding van die leerder.

entries.source: Make one small change and test the result.
entries.value: Doe 'n klein verandering en test wat resultaat.

entries.source: Make one strong counterargument per turn, ask for rebuttals, and track the strongest claims on both sides.
entries.value: Gee per beurt 'n sterk teenargument, vraag om weerleggingen en hou die sterkste claims aan beide kanten by.

entries.source: Make roles for a study group

entries.value: Maak sin van syfers en grafieke

entries.source: Making claims precise, checking evidence, finding assumptions, and improving reasoning quality.
entries.value: Claims preciezer maak, bewyse kontroleer, aannames vind en die gehalte van redeneer verbeter.

entries.source: Many learners search by comparing tools they already know. A clear comparison page helps them choose the right learning behavior without hiding the tradeoffs.
entries.value: Baie leerders zoeken deur hulpmiddels te vergelyk wat hulle al kennen. 'n duidelike vergelijkingsbladsy help hulle die regte leergedrag te kiezen sonder die afwegingen te verbergen.

entries.source: Map course structure, prioritize workload, and maintain a weekly plan.

entries.source: Math help is strongest when the learner can see the next move, explain why it works, and catch the mistake before it repeats.
entries.value: Wiskundehulp is die sterkste wanneer die leerder die volgende stap kan sien, verduidelik waarom wat werk en die fout kan opvang voordat wat homself herhaal.

entries.source: Math help, writing feedback, code tutoring, history context, homework hints, and exam prep are separate needs.
entries.value: Wiskundehulp, skryferugvoer, kodebegeleiding, historiese konteks, huiswerktips en eksamenvoorbereiding is afsonderlikee behoeften.

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Solve math by understanding each step. Your coach checks your work, points out slips, and builds confidence.
entries.value: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik om te leer in plaas van passief antwoorde te versamel. Die modus is gebou rondom 'n spesifieke taak: wiskunde oplossen deur elke stap te besluitgrijpen. Jy afrigter kontroleert jy werk, wijst op vergissingen en bou vertroue op.

entries.source: Music Theory Coach prompts and study loop
My exam is on this date. Here is the syllabus, my weak areas, and my available time. Make a realistic plan with daily recall.
entries.value: My eksamen is op hierdie datum. Hier is die sillabus, my swak areas en my beskikbare tyd. Maak 'n realistiese plan met daaglikse herroeping.

entries.source: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Noem 'n werklike of fiktiewe persoonlikheid en debatteer met hulle oor enige onderwerp. Die KI kanaliseer hul openbare styl en wêreldbeskouing terwyl die debat regverdig gehou word.

entries.source: Name patterns, choose strategies, plan experiments, and review outcomes.
entries.value: Benoem patronen, kies strategieën, plan eksperimente en evalueer uitkomsten.

entries.source: Name the exact operation, theorem, or step that feels uncertain.
entries.value: Benoem die exacte besluitwerking, stelling of stap wat onzeker voel.

entries.source: Name the exact stuck point before asking for help.
entries.value: Benoem wat exacte punt waar jy vastloopt voordat jy om hulp vra.

entries.source: Name the misconception or assumption that changed.
entries.value: Benoem die wanopvatting of aanname wat veranderde.

entries.source: Name the subject and learner need.
entries.value: Benoem die onderwerp en die leerbehoefte.

entries.source: Name the topic or skill you want to understand.
entries.value: Benoem die onderwerp of die vaardigheid wat jy wil begrijpen.

entries.source: Need a first step right now?

Never present generated dialogue as authenticated quotation. Do not sanitize harmful views or glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, or violence. Context should clarify without excusing. Do not give medical, legal, financial, or harmful advice through the persona. Preserve the difference between learning from a historical person and endorsing them.
entries.value: Presenteer gegenereere dialoog nooit as geauthulleticeerd citaat. Verdoezel skadelijke opvattingen nie en verheerlik onderdrukking, kasteïsme, rassisme, slawerny, misogynie, autoritarisme of geweld nie. Context moet verduideliken sonder goed te praten. Gee geen medisch, juridisch, financieel of skadelijk advies via die persona. Bewaar wat verschil tussen leer van 'n historiese persoon en wat persoon onderschrijven.

entries.source: Never reveal future answers. Avoid trick questions unless the topic calls for advanced challenge.
entries.value: Onthul nooit toekomsige antwoorde. Vermijd strikvrae tensy die onderwerp om gevorderde uitdaging vra.

entries.source: New inspir users and learners building a better AI learning habit from the start.
entries.value: Nuwe inspir-gebruikers en leerders wat vanaf wat begin 'n beter AI-leergewoonte bou.

entries.source: No waiver by Company of any term or condition set forth in Terms shall be deemed a further or continuing waiver of such term or condition or a waiver of any other term or condition, and any failure of Company to assert a right or provision under Terms shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision. If any provision of Terms is held by a court or other tribunal of competent jurisdiction to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable for any reason, such provision shall be eliminated or limited to the minimum extent such that the remaining provisions of Terms will continue in full force and effect.
entries.value: Geen afstand deur Company van enige bepaling of voorwaarde in die Voorwaardes word beschouwd as 'n verdere of voortdurende afstand van wat bepaling of voorwaarde, of as afstand van enige ander bepaling of voorwaarde. As Company nalaat 'n reg of bepaling onder die Voorwaardes af te dwingen, vormt dat geen afstand van dat reg of wat bepaling. As 'n bepaling van die Voorwaardes deur 'n bevoegde regbank of ander bevoegd tribunaal om watter reden dan ook ongeldig, onwettig of onafdwingbaar word geacht, word wat bepaling geschrapt of beperk tot die minimale omvang, zodat die resterende bepalingen van die Voorwaardes volledig van kracht bly.

entries.source: No. Private saved chats use private identifiers, are not listed in the sitemap, and are not included in AI discovery files such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or ai-content-index.json.
entries.value: Nee. Privé gestoor chats gebruik privé-ID's, staan nie in die sitemap en is nie opgenomen in AI-discoveryleers soos llms.txt, llms-full.txt of ai-inhoud-index.json.

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.
entries.value: Nee. Openbare bladsye is indekseerbaar, maar privé gestoor chats is nie opgenomen in die sitemap, llms-leers of AI-inhoudindex.

entries.source: No. Public subject pages and guest mode entrypoints are indexable, but private saved chats are excluded from discovery files.
entries.value: Nee. Openbare onderwerpbladsye en toegangspunte vir gasmodus is indekseerbaar, maar privé gestoor chats is uitgesloten van discoveryleers.

entries.source: No. The category structure helps search engines understand the library, but each page is meant to help a learner choose a guide, open the right mode, and keep studying actively.
entries.value: Nee. Die categoriestruktuur help soekenjins die biblioteek te besluitgrijpen, maar elke bladsy is bedoel om 'n leerder te help 'n gids te kiezen, die regte modus te oopmaak en aktief te bly studeren.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: Nee. Die vergelyking linkt net na openbare gasmodus-toegangspunte, gidse, promptbibliotheken en leerpaden. Privé gestoor gesprekken word nie as broninhoud gebruik.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: Nee. Die vergelijkingsbladsye is geskryf om te laat sien wanneer inspir 'n beter eerste klik is vir lewendig AI-begeleiding, prompts en gaanstleermodusse, en wanneer 'n gestruktureerde kurrikulum of amptelike cursusbiblioteek nog steeds nuttig kan is.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Nee. Hulle skakel net na openbare bladsye, openbare gasmodusse, gidse, prompts en leerpaden. Privé gestoor chats bly buite discovery-oppervlakken.

entries.source: No. Treat generated dialogue as a learning simulation. Cite real primary or secondary sources for factual claims.
entries.value: Nee. Behandel gegenereere dialoog as 'n leersimulasie. Haal regte primêre of sekondêre bronne aan vir feitelike stellings.

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: Nie vir elke leerbehoefte. Khan Academy is nuttig vir gestruktureerdee lessen en oefening. inspir is nuttig wanneer 'n leerder lewendig AI-hulp, Sokratiese vrae, wenke, vasvrae, flitskaarte, terugvoer of 'n studiewerkvloei nodig wat rondom presies datgene waaraan wat werk.

entries.source: Not another answer box. A place to learn.
entries.value: Nie nog 'n antwoordkassie nie. 'n Plek om te leer.

entries.source: Once the Cancellation Period is over, Tao will not refund the subscription fee even if you decide to cancel your subscription. For requesting a cancellation, you must contact Tao customer care or address an email to support@inspir.app. Once you opt to cancel your subscription, you will no longer have access to the subscription features.
entries.value: Zodra die annuleringsperiode voorbij is, zal Tao wat intekeningsgeld nie terugbetaal, zelfs nie as jy besluit jy intekening op te zeggen. Vir 'n annuleringsversoek moet jy kontak opneem met die klantendiens van Tao of 'n e-mail sturen na support@inspir.app. Zodra jy ervoor kies jy intekening op te zeggen, heb jy geen toegang meer tot die intekeningsfunksies.

entries.source: One AI learning system, several school jobs.
One map for modes, prompts, paths, and guides.
entries.value: Een kaart vir modusse, prompts, paden en gidse.

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: 'n fout wat leerders maak, is elke kaart dieselfde hanteer. As jy 'n kaart direk kent, kan wat more weer herhalen tijdverspilling is. As jy 'n kaart mis, kan 'n week wag te lank is.

entries.source: Open {value1} and turn the guide into a live tutoring session.
entries.value: Maak {value1} oop en verander die gids in 'n lewendig tutorsessie.

entries.source: Open a mode and start immediately, with no account needed for the public guest experience.
entries.value: Open 'n modus en begin dadelik, sonder dat 'n rekening nodig is vir die openbare gaanservaring.

entries.source: Open a public mode, test the student behavior, and inspect whether it asks, hints, quizzes, or critiques appropriately.
entries.value: Maak 'n openbare modus, test wat leerdergedrag oop en kontroleer of wat gepas vra, wenke geeft, vasvrat of kritiek geeft.

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Maak 'n gedeelde werkspasie oop met 'n KI-werknemer. Skep 'n rowwe konsep, ruil wysigings uit, daag swak punte uit, teken besluite aan en vertrek met konkrete vordering.

entries.source: Open Learn Anything when an answer needs a simpler model before review.
entries.value: Maak oop Learn Anything wanneer 'n antwoord 'n eenvoudiger model nodig wat vir die hersiening.

entries.source: Open Learn Anything, ask for the prerequisite ideas, then switch into Socratic Instruction to test your model.
entries.value: Maak Learn Anything, vraag om die vereiste voorkennis oop en schakel daarna na Socratic Instruction om jy model te testen.

entries.source: Open the AI learning tools behind this category.
entries.value: Maak oop die AI-leerhulpmiddels agter hierdie categorie.
